title: CottageCraft: Festive Easter Eggs
description: An Add-on for the CottageCraft Modpack. Adds 54 Festive Easter Eggs with custom patterns and themes including Pride Flag Patterns
body:
An Add-on Mod created for [CottageCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cottagecraft-mod) A charming Minecraft mod that adds 54 vibrant and custom-designed Easter eggs to your game! These delightful eggs aren't just for Easter anymore, they can be enjoyed all year round as whimsical decorations throughout your world. Each egg can be placed on a single block up to six times and oriented facing different directions, allowing you to create breathtaking displays of color and texture wherever you desire. Whether you're looking to add some festive cheer to your home or create an enchanting Easter-themed landscape, CottageCraft Festive Easter Eggs has got you covered! In addition to the classic designs, the mod also includes pride flag-based eggs to showcase your support for diversity and inclusivity within the game. So brighten up your Minecraft experience today and let the joy of these adorable eggs fill your world! --- - 54 Festive Eggs - 54 Festive Egg Chests - 6 Different Blockstates - Directional Placement - Waterloggable - Placeable on most blocks - Edible Craft by placing an egg (any vanilla variant) in a stonecutter. To get a chest version simply surround a chest with 8 eggs in a crafting table Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) *Feel free to use this mod in other modpacks but keep the download within the Modrinth Ecosystem and do not reupload*
